summary: Iteration 11 testing complete. Fixed 1 backend bug (password change endpoint). All Settings tabs, Help page, and PDF export working correctly.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: KeyError: 'password' - get_current_user excludes password field but change_password needed it
fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added separate DB query to fetch user with password for verification

passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint
Backend: User signup
Backend: User login
Backend: Invalid login rejection
Backend: Demo mode creates account with 3 properties
Backend: Demo mode has seeded properties
Backend: Get default preferences
Backend: Update company name
Backend: Update notification preferences
Backend: Password change success
Backend: Password change wrong current password rejection
Backend: Contact form support request
Backend: Contact form billing inquiry
Backend: Contact form feedback
Backend: PDF export generates valid PDF
Backend: PDF export 404 for non-existent property
Backend: /auth/me endpoint
Frontend: Settings page loads with 4 tabs
Frontend: Account tab shows user info and company name field
Frontend: Notifications tab shows toggles and reminder timing buttons
Frontend: Security tab shows password change form
Frontend: Support tab shows contact form with type selector
Frontend: Help page loads with Getting Started section
Frontend: Help page FAQ accordion works
Frontend: Property detail page Export Report button works
Frontend: PDF download successful
Frontend: Contact form shows success message after submission
Frontend: Password validation - 8 character minimum
Frontend: Password validation - passwords must match
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed change_password endpoint to fetch user with password separately

test_credentials.demo_mode: No credentials needed - creates temporary account automatically

seed_data_creation: Demo mode creates 3 UK properties, 12 compliance records, 6 tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page has 4 tabs (Account, Notifications, Security, Support). Help page at /app/help has Getting Started and FAQ sections. PDF export works from property detail page. Email notifications and contact form email sending are MOCKED (marked 'Coming soon' in UI).

settings_account_tab.details: Shows Full Name (disabled), Email (disabled), Company Name (editable), Save Changes button

settings_notifications_tab.details: In-app notifications toggle, Email reminders toggle (Coming soon), Weekly digest toggle (Coming soon), Marketing emails toggle, Reminder timing buttons (90/60/30/14/7/3/1 days)

settings_security_tab.details: Current Password, New Password, Confirm New Password fields with validation (8+ chars, passwords match)

settings_support_tab.details: Contact type selector (Support/Billing/Feedback), Subject, Message, Send Message button, Success message after submission

help_page.details: Help Center header, Getting Started (4 steps), FAQ accordion with 4 categories

pdf_export.details: Export Report button on property detail page downloads PDF with property details, compliance records, tasks, documents

demo_mode.details: Creates demo account with 3 UK properties and seeded compliance data

mocked_apis.email_notifications: Marked 'Coming soon' in UI - toggles save to DB but no actual emails sent
mocked_apis.contact_form_email: Form saves to DB but doesn't send actual email
